purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 Chapter 3: Pattern Around Us
description: Videos covering prerequisite concepts: skip counting, basic shape recognition, simple sequences

videos.title: Skip Counting by 2s, 5s, and 10s | Counting Patterns for Kids
videos.description: Learn to skip count by 2s, 5s, and 10s. Skip counting creates number patterns and helps you see how numbers grow in a regular way!
learningObjectives: Recognize the pattern in skip counting

videos.title: Basic Shapes for Kids | Circles, Squares, Triangles and More
videos.description: Review basic 2D shapes: circles, squares, triangles, rectangles, pentagons, and hexagons. Knowing shapes helps you spot shape patterns!

videos.title: Simple Patterns and Sequences | What Comes Next?
videos.description: Learn to look at a simple pattern and figure out what comes next. Practice with color patterns, shape patterns, and easy number patterns.
learningObjectives: Identify the repeating part of a simple pattern
Continue a simple pattern by finding what comes next
Explain the rule of a simple pattern

usageNotes.purpose: Review skip counting, shape recognition, and simple sequence continuation before learning about patterns in Chapter 3
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select videos based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Skip counting -> Shape recognition -> Simple sequences (builds foundational understanding for pattern concepts)
